Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Chipmunks get stuck in traffic in 'Car Wars', then in 'Mr. Fix-It', Simon gets annoyed with everyone asking him to fix things so he decides to play dumb until he gets some thanks.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room in 'A Room of One's Own', then in 'Carts and Crafts', Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, so enters a contest to win a new bike.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Tales of the Ninja Turtles
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Scratch is a bigger threat than Leo thought...the Turtles have an arch-nemesis.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Trust and teamwork are at an all-time low as Sonic goes against Chaos Sonic leaving Rebel Rogue and Renegade Knuckles to battle the supercharged Chaos Council forces alone.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Sonic tells Nine about Ghost Hill, its shard, and its blueprint to reassemble the Paradox Prism to restart the real world. But all Nine hears is that there's a fourth shard.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Chuck moves in after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house in 'Caught Rubber - Handed', then in 'And... Action!', Lily films her own K-Drama finale with her family as the cast & crew.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The family scrambles to prep for inspection in 'Just a Little Pipe Problem', then in 'Camp Chuck', Chuck's theatre camp goes haywire.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Boog creates a system of barter using 'money', but Elliot quickly becomes cash-crazed, throwing the camp into chaos.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The discovery of a mysterious map convinces the campers a treasure is buried on a nearby island and they set off to look for it.
